brand_origins.notes: Aesop is an Australian-founded company headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, and its products are not manufactured in Canada.
AKT is a premium, natural deodorant brand founded in London in 2015 by West End performers Ed Currie and Andy Coxon. All formulations are made in the UK and packaged in plastic-free packaging.

Arm & Hammer is an American brand owned by Church & Dwight Co., Inc., headquartered in Ewing, New Jersey. Their deodorants are manufactured in the United States and distributed in Canada, but not produced there.

Armani is an Italian fashion brand founded in 1975 by Giorgio Armani and Sergio Galeotti. Its headquarters are in Milan, Italy, and it is not a Canadian company. There is no evidence to suggest that Armani deodorants are manufactured in Canada.

AXE is a men's grooming brand launched in France in 1983 by Unilever. While the brand is not Canadian-owned, some AXE products are manufactured in Canada, as indicated on packaging and retailer listings.

Ban deodorant products are manufactured in Canada, as indicated on Canadian retail websites. However, the brand's country of origin and company headquarters are not specified in the available information.

Caudalie is a French skincare company founded in 1995, specializing in vinotherapy products made from grape extracts. Their products are designed and manufactured in France, including their Vinofresh Natural Stick Deodorant. While Caudalie products are available in Canada, the company is not Canadian-owned, and their products are not made in Canada.
Certain Dri is a U.S.-based brand headquartered in Solon, Ohio, and is not a Canadian company. Its products are not manufactured in Canada.

Corpus is a personal care brand founded in 2018 by J.P. Mastey, specializing in natural deodorants and body care products. The company is headquartered in Los Angeles, California, and its products are manufactured in the USA. While Corpus products are available in Canada through retailers like Well.ca and Walmart.ca, the brand itself is not Canadian-owned, and its products are not made in Canada.

Crystal Deodorant is a U.S.-based company founded in 1984, known for its mineral-based deodorants. While their products are available in Canada, they are not a Canadian company, and there is no evidence indicating that their products are manufactured in Canada.

Degree is a deodorant brand owned by Unilever, a British-Dutch multinational company headquartered in London, UK. While Degree is not a Canadian company, some of its products are manufactured in Canada. For example, the Degree Aluminum-Free Deodorant Calming Lavender is made in Canada with imported parts. ([instacart.ca](https://www.instacart.ca/products/21706391-degree-aluminum-free-deodorant-calming-lavender-2-6-oz?utm_source=openai))

Dove is owned by Unilever, a British-Dutch multinational company headquartered in London, England. While Unilever has a significant presence in Canada, including offices and distribution networks, Dove's manufacturing facilities are primarily located in the United States, Mexico, and Germany. However, some Dove deodorant products are made in Canada, as indicated on their packaging. For example, the Dove Aluminum-Free Deodorant Stick Cucumber and Green Tea is made in Canada. Therefore, while Dove is not a Canadian-founded or Canadian-owned brand, certain Dove deodorant products are manufactured in Canada.

Dove Men+Care is a men's personal care brand owned by Unilever, a British-Dutch multinational company headquartered in London, England. The brand's products are manufactured in various countries, including the United States, Mexico, and Germany, and are distributed in Canada through Unilever Canada.

Dr. Squatch is an American personal care company founded in 2013 in San Diego, California, and now based in Los Angeles. Its products are marketed as natural and include deodorants, soaps, and other personal care items. The company does not have Canadian ownership, and there is no evidence to suggest that its products are manufactured in Canada.

Drunk Elephant is a Houston-based skincare brand founded in 2012 by Tiffany Masterson. It was acquired by Shiseido in 2019. The brand offers a range of products, including deodorants, and operates in Canada through its website and retailers like Sephora Canada. However, there is no evidence to suggest that Drunk Elephant is a Canadian company or that its products are manufactured in Canada.

Dry Idea is an American brand of antiperspirant manufactured and sold by Thriving Brands LLC, headquartered in Rocky Hill, Connecticut. While the brand is American, some of its products are manufactured in Canada, as indicated on various product labels and retailer listings.

DuraDry is a U.S.-based company specializing in skin care and deodorant products, founded in 2012. Their headquarters are located in the United States, and their products are not manufactured in Canada.

Each & Every is a clean beauty brand founded in 2017 by beauty-industry veterans in Cincinnati, Ohio. Their products are made in the USA and are available in Canada through retailers like Walmart Canada and Canadian Glow.

EiR NYC is a skincare brand founded in 2013, headquartered in Brooklyn, New York. Their products are handcrafted in Brooklyn, New York, and sold worldwide. There is no evidence to suggest that EiR NYC is a Canadian company or that their products are made in Canada.
Every Man Jack is a U.S.-based company headquartered in Mill Valley, California, and its products are manufactured in the United States.

Evolve Together is a personal care brand founded in 2020, headquartered in West Hollywood, California. Their deodorants are manufactured in the USA, as indicated on their product pages and retailer listings.
Freedom Deodorant is a U.S.-based company founded in 2017, specializing in natural, aluminum-free deodorants for women.

Gillette is an American brand of safety razors and personal care products, including deodorants, owned by Procter & Gamble. Its headquarters are in Boston, Massachusetts, and it does not manufacture products in Canada.

brand_origins.headquarters_location: New York City, New York, United States
brand_origins.notes: Harry's is an American company founded in 2012, headquartered in New York City. Its products, including deodorants, are manufactured in the United States and Germany, with no manufacturing operations in Canada.
Configured as a known Canadian brand.
Jason is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, USA. However, their deodorant products are manufactured in Canada, as indicated on product packaging and retailer listings.
Kopari is a Honolulu-based company founded by Kiana Cabell, specializing in coconut-based skincare products. Their deodorants are sold in Canada but are not manufactured there.
Kosas is a U.S.-based cosmetics company headquartered in Los Angeles, California. Their products are manufactured in the United States, Italy, and Korea, but not in Canada.

Lavanila is a U.S.-based company headquartered in Shrewsbury, New Jersey. Their products are available in Canada through retailers like Anthropologie, but there is no evidence indicating that Lavanila is a Canadian company or that their products are manufactured in Canada.
Little Seed Farm is a family-owned business based in Lebanon, Tennessee, USA, specializing in sustainably produced deodorants and skincare products.

brand_origins.headquarters_location: Salt Lake City, Utah, United States
brand_origins.notes: Lumé is a U.S.-based deodorant brand founded in 2017 by Dr. Shannon Klingman. The company is headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, and was acquired by Harry's Labs in December 2021. While the company is American, some of its products are manufactured in Canada. Additionally, Lumé products are available for purchase through Canadian retailers, such as Walmart Canada.

brand_origins.headquarters_location: New York, New York, United States
brand_origins.notes: Malin + Goetz is a New York-based company founded in 2004, with products manufactured locally in the United States.

Mando is a men's personal care line launched by Lume Deodorant in late 2022. While Lume is based in Salt Lake City, Utah, Mando products are manufactured in both the USA and Canada, as stated on their official website.
Mario Badescu is a U.S.-based skincare brand founded in 1967, with its corporate headquarters in Edison, New Jersey. The company does not indicate that its products are made in Canada.

Menscience Androceuticals is a men's skincare and nutritional company founded in 2004 and headquartered in Miami, Florida. Their products are distributed through their website and at retail locations throughout the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom. However, there is no specific information indicating that their products are manufactured in Canada.
Configured as a known Canadian brand.

brand_origins.headquarters_location: New York, New York, United States
brand_origins.notes: Mitchum is a U.S.-based brand of antiperspirant-deodorant owned by Revlon, headquartered in New York, New York, United States. The brand was founded in 1927 in Paris, Tennessee, U.S., and was acquired by Revlon in 1970. Mitchum products are available in Canada, but there is no evidence to suggest they are manufactured there.

Native is an American brand founded in 2015 and headquartered in San Francisco, California. It was acquired by Procter & Gamble in 2017. There is no evidence to suggest that Native products are manufactured in Canada.

Nubian Heritage is an American brand headquartered in Amityville, New York. While the company is based in the United States, some of their deodorant products are manufactured in Canada, as indicated on product packaging and retailer listings.

Oars + Alps is a U.S.-based company founded in 2016, specializing in men's skincare products, including deodorants. Their headquarters are located in Chicago, Illinois, United States. There is no evidence to suggest that their products are made or manufactured in Canada.

Old Spice is an American brand of male grooming products, including deodorants, antiperspirants, shampoos, body washes, and soaps. It was launched in 1937 by the Shulton Company, founded by William Lightfoot Schultz. In 1990, Procter & Gamble acquired the brand. The products are manufactured in the United States and are not made in Canada.

Pacifica is an American cosmetics company founded in 1996, specializing in vegan and cruelty-free beauty products. Their headquarters are in Carpinteria, California, and their products are primarily manufactured in the USA. While Pacifica products are available in Canada, they are not a Canadian brand, and their products are not made in Canada.
Configured as a known Canadian brand.

Salt & Stone is a U.S.-based company founded by Nima Jalali in 2017. Their products are available in Canada through various retailers, but the company is not Canadian-owned or headquartered in Canada.

Secret is a women's antiperspirant/deodorant brand manufactured by Procter & Gamble, headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA. While the brand is American, some Secret products are made in Canada, as indicated on certain packaging. For example, a product listed on Acme Stores' website specifies that it is 'Made in Canada'.

SweatBlock is a U.S.-based company specializing in antiperspirants and deodorants for excessive sweating and odor. Their products are manufactured in the USA and are available in Canada through retailers like Walmart Canada.

Tom’s of Maine is an American company founded in 1970 by Tom and Kate Chappell in Maine, United States. It is headquartered in Kennebunk, Maine, and is a subsidiary of Colgate-Palmolive. While some of its products are manufactured in Canada through contract manufacturers, the company itself is not Canadian.

Ursa Major is a Vermont-based company specializing in natural skincare products, including deodorants. Their headquarters are located in Waterbury, Vermont, United States. While their products are available in Canada through various retailers, there is no evidence to suggest that Ursa Major is a Canadian company or that their products are manufactured in Canada.
Vanicream is a U.S.-based company specializing in sensitive skin care products. Their deodorants are manufactured in the USA, not Canada.

Wild is a UK-based sustainable personal care brand founded in 2019 by Freddy Ward and Charlie Bowes-Lyon. The company specializes in refillable, natural deodorants and other personal care products. In April 2025, Wild was acquired by Unilever, a global consumer goods company. While Wild offers its products in Canada, it is not a Canadian-founded or Canadian-owned company, and its products are not manufactured in Canada.
